name: @cars-auto/worker
description: Standalone BullMQ worker for CarsAuto — processes 'translations' and 'notifications' jobs in a process separate from the HTTP API (apps/api), so background CPU work never competes with request handling.

scripts.dev: npx rimraf dist && npx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node dist/main.js
scripts.test: echo "No worker-specific tests yet — processor logic is covered by apps/api's test suite until the apps/api copies are retired" && exit 0
